SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_IGNITE.title: Ignite
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_IGNITE.descript: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 2 times. Initiative: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_RENORMALIZE.des: This turn, reset your Energy spending mode.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_RENORMALIZE.sma: This turn, reset your Energy spending mode.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_PRESSURE_DROP.s: If the enemy has more than 0 Strength, it loses {StrengthLoss:diff()} Strength.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_SUPERNOVA.title: Supernova
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_SUPERNOVA.descr: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies 2 times. Decisive: Apply -{Electric:diff()} Electric Potential.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_SUPERNOVA.smart: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies 2 times. Decisive: Apply -{Electric:diff()} Electric Potential.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_LEAP.title: Leap
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_TRANCE_BATTLE.d: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. You cannot draw any more cards this turn. Invert your Energy.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_TRANCE_BATTLE.s: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. You cannot draw any more cards this turn. Invert your Energy.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_LASER_PULSE.des: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies 3 times.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_LASER_PULSE.sma: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies 3 times.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_MONOTONE_FORM.d: If the costs of cards played this turn remain strictly increasing or strictly decreasing, whenever you play a card, multiply your Energy by that card's cost.
SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_MONOTONE_FORM.s: If the costs of cards played this turn remain strictly increasing or strictly decreasing, whenever you play a card, multiply your Energy by that card's cost.

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COUPLING.title: Coupling

SCRAPYARD_CARD_SCRAPYARD_COUPLING.smartD: If X is prime, deal {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} damage {IfUpgraded:show:X+1|X} times to random enemies. Otherwise, gain {IfUpgraded:show:2X|X} Block.
